reviews.review_description: Just wasted $4.99 on an app that it incredibly difficult to work. SO frustrating. There is a tutorial "cassette" but no instructions on how to play it. In the meantime, I have no clue how I'm supposed to move the pieces (I've tried every conceivable way). And now it looks as if I'm screwed in terms of getting a refund from Occulus. Live and learn. Prior to this, I had only gotten 3 apps. They all work OK, but I'll probably never get another one after this experience. BEWARE!
Very disappointed that there is no multiplayer
Very difficult to move pieces to where I want

reviews.review_title: All right if on a budget
reviews.review_description: I spent maybe 4 or 5 hours playing this so far. It is very difficult to move the pieces and to overall control. But if you're on a budget and want to play chess it's decent.
